title: Add AnggunFM to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [AnggunFM](https://www.anggunfm.my) to chat
- Display a greeting message for the team.

Fixes #10484

gist.headline: Tuning into AnggunFM
gist.blurb: The hive is buzzing to a new frequency! We've added AnggunFM to the community showcase, complete with a special greeting for the team.
gist.summary: Added the AnggunFM radio app to the community showcase and greenhouse, including a custom greeting message for their team.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and interact with AnggunFM directly through the community apps directory.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy radio station setup in a greenhouse. Polly the bee wearing tiny headphones, tuning a retro radio or microphone. Plants growing around the radio equipment.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny headphones, tuning a retro radio inside a lush greenhouse. Code-plants and vines grow around the broadcasting equipment. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
